title: Student Housing Ano Poli: Perfect 2-Bed Flat

about.summary: Student housing Ano Poli: This fully equipped private apartment in Thessaloniki is located in the Kleious building, at the beginning of Ano Poli, the traditional district of Thessaloniki. It is available for Erasmus accommodation and suitable for students, digital nomads and remote workers.

sections.title: 🏠 Student housing Ano Poli
sections.content: The apartment is fully equipped and has everything needed for a comfortable stay. It works well for 1-2 students looking for student housing Ano Poli close to university life and the historical center.
highlights: Fully equipped: The apartment has the essentials needed for everyday living.
Student-friendly: Perfect student housing Ano Poli for Erasmus students and digital nomads seeking a private base in Thessaloniki.
Flexible stay: Also available for digital nomads and remote workers.

sections.title: 📍 Location near Ano Poli & Tsinari
sections.content: The building is in the historical center of Thessaloniki, close to the commercial centre and sited at the beginning of Ano Poli.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarket, bakery, marketplace, bus station, restaurant, tavern and cafe are around 50 meters away.
Walkable area: The commercial centre is around a 5-10 minute walk away, so daily bus use is not usually necessary.
University access: Aristotle University and City College, University of York Europe Campus are within walking distance.
Nearby landmarks: Around 5 minutes on foot to Church of Agios Dimitrios, 10 minutes to Aristotelous Square and 14 minutes to Rotunda and Arch of Galerius.

sections.title: 🎓 Ideal for Erasmus Students & Remote Workers
sections.content:
This apartment is ideal for Erasmus accommodation and for students coming to Thessaloniki for their studies. It is also available for digital nomads and remote workers. For official university info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our City College student apartment.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content: Maintenance, water and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is paid separately. We will be happy to welcome you in Thessaloniki and host you in this studio. For more info, you may reach out through the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Smoking is allowed outside only. Playing musical instruments is negotiable.

seo.seo_title: Student Housing Ano Poli: Perfect 2-Bed Flat
seo.seo_description: Student housing Ano Poli perfect for Erasmus students. This 2-bedroom flat is near Aristotle University and ideal for digital nomads.
